content:
I am a 4th year PhD Student at the Computer Vision Laboratory at Linköping University under the supervision of Prof. Michael Felsberg. My main focus is sparsity and uncertainty-aware deep learning for sparse and noisy data such as LiDAR, optical flow fields, and RGB-D.
I obtained my master’s degree in 2016 in Communication and Information Technology from Nile University, Egypt. My master thesis title was “The AERIAL tracker: A Robust Visual Tracker for Micro-Drones”. I obtained my BSc degree with honors in 2011 in Computers and Systems Engineering from Mansoura University, Egypt.
summary: I am a 4th year PhD Student at the Computer Vision Laboratory at Linköping University under the supervision of Prof. Michael Felsberg. My main focus is sparsity and uncertainty-aware deep learning for sparse and noisy data such as LiDAR, optical flow fields, and RGB-D.
title: Abdelrahman Eldesokey (Abdo)

summary: This paper proposes a sparse depth completion approach that is uncertainty-aware. We propose a novel paradigm of learning the uncertainty of the input and propagate it through the network until the final output. Our approach can be used with other sparse problems such as sparse optical flow and time-of-flight rectification.
title: Uncertainty-Aware CNNs for Depth Completion: Uncertainty from Beginning to End

content: Supplementary notes can be added here, including code and math.
title: Uncertainty-Aware CNNs for Depth Completion: Uncertainty from Beginning to End
